sentences.arabic: كَانَ عِنْدَ مَحَلِّ الأَلْعَابِ تَخْفِيضٌ كَبِيرٌ.
sentences.translation: U prodavnici igračaka bila je velika rasprodaja.
sentences.translationEn: There was a big sale at the toy shop.

sentences.translation: Rašid i prijatelj su otišli u prodavnicu.
sentences.translationEn: Rashid and his friend went to the shop.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الأَلْعَابُ أَرْخَصَ مِنَ العَادَةِ بِكَثِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Igračke su bile mnogo jeftinije nego obično.
sentences.translationEn: The toys were much cheaper than usual.

sentences.translation: Svaki od njih je kupio igračku za sopstveni novac.
sentences.translationEn: Each one bought a toy with his own money.
